tagline: Every email. Every industry. Done right.

hero.subheadline: Your front desk spends hours every day writing the same emails. ReplyRight drafts professional, on-brand replies the moment a message arrives — tailored to your industry, ready to send in seconds. Less time in the inbox. More time doing the work that pays.

incoming_email.label: Incoming
incoming_email.subject: Question about my upcoming crown
incoming_email.snippet: Hi, I wanted to check if my Delta Dental insurance will cover the crown procedure we talked about. Also, is there any way to move my Thursday appointment to the morning? Thanks!

ai_draft_reply.label: Draft Reply
ai_draft_reply.body: Hi Sarah! Great question — Delta Dental PPO plans typically cover 50% of crown procedures after your deductible is met. We'll verify your specific benefits before your appointment and have a cost estimate ready for you. As for Thursday, we have an 8:30 AM opening — shall I move you over? Just reply and we'll take care of it.

social_proof_bar.label: Trusted by practices and firms across the Pacific Northwest

problem_section.label: The Real Cost of a Buried Inbox
problem_section.headline: Routine emails shouldn't take all day.
problem_section.subheadline: They do anyway — and it's costing you more than time.

pain_cards.title: Hours lost to copy-paste replies
pain_cards.body: Your front desk rewrites the same answers dozens of times a week — appointment confirmations, insurance questions, quote follow-ups. Every hour spent on routine email is an hour not spent on patients, clients, or actual work.

pain_cards.title: Inconsistent replies hurt your brand
pain_cards.body: When three different staff members answer the same question three different ways, your practice or firm looks disorganized. One wrong word in a legal or medical context can do real damage.

pain_cards.title: Slow responses cost you business
pain_cards.body: A prospect who emails your firm at 2pm and hears back at 9am the next day has already called your competitor. Speed is trust — and a buried inbox means someone else wins the client.

how_it_works.label: Simple Setup. Real Results.
how_it_works.headline: Up and running in three steps.

steps.title: Connect
steps.description: Link your existing email inbox — Gmail, Outlook, or any IMAP account. No migration. No disruption. Takes about 5 minutes.

steps.title: Train
steps.description: Tell ReplyRight your industry, your tone, and how you handle common questions. Upload your FAQs or let it learn from your sent history. It becomes yours.

steps.title: Reply
steps.description: Every incoming email gets a draft reply — ready for your approval or auto-sent for low-risk messages. You stay in control. Your inbox stays clean.

industry_verticals.label: Built for Your Industry
industry_verticals.headline: We speak your language — not just email.
industry_verticals.intro: Generic AI tools write generic emails. ReplyRight knows the difference between a dental intake form and a legal retainer question. It knows your terminology, your compliance constraints, and your client expectations.

industries.name: Dental Practices
industries.example_email_type: Insurance coverage questions, appointment requests, billing inquiries
industries.sample_reply_snippet: "We'll verify your Delta Dental benefits before your visit and have a full cost breakdown ready at check-in."

industries.name: Law Firms
industries.example_email_type: New client intake, case status requests, consultation scheduling
industries.sample_reply_snippet: "Our intake team will follow up within one business day — please note that this email does not establish an attorney-client relationship."

industries.name: HVAC & Plumbing
industries.example_email_type: Quote requests, emergency service calls, maintenance follow-ups
industries.sample_reply_snippet: "We have a technician available Thursday between 10–2 — I'll send a confirmation with a 30-minute heads-up before arrival."

industries.name: Real Estate Teams
industries.example_email_type: Showing requests, offer inquiries, buyer pre-qualification questions
industries.sample_reply_snippet: "That property is still active — I can get you in for a showing this weekend, Saturday or Sunday morning. What works for you?"

industries.name: Medical Clinics
industries.example_email_type: Referral coordination, prescription refill requests, appointment reminders
industries.sample_reply_snippet: "Your refill request has been sent to the provider for review — please allow 2 business days and check with your pharmacy directly."

features.label: What Makes ReplyRight Different
features.headline: Not a generic email tool. Something better.

features_list.title: Industry-Specific by Default
features_list.description: ReplyRight doesn't just write emails — it writes the right emails. Each industry vertical comes pre-trained with terminology, tone, and compliance considerations baked in. A dental reply sounds like a dental office. A legal reply sounds like a law firm. No prompting required.

features_list.title: You Approve. You're Always in Control.
features_list.description: Every draft sits in your approval queue before it sends — unless you've flagged certain message types as low-risk for auto-send. You decide the rules. ReplyRight follows them. Full audit trail included.

features_list.title: Gets Smarter the Longer You Use It
features_list.description: ReplyRight learns from every approved reply, every edit you make, and every piece of feedback you give it. After 30 days, it knows your business well enough to draft like your best staff member — consistently, every time.

testimonials.label: From practices and firms just like yours
testimonials.headline: Real results. Real people. Less email.

cards.quote: Our front desk was spending the first two hours of every morning just getting through email. Now it takes 20 minutes. ReplyRight drafts everything — insurance questions, appointment changes, billing stuff — and it actually sounds like us. Patients keep telling us we're so responsive.
cards.name: Dr. Melissa Tran
cards.title: Owner, Family Dental of Renton

cards.quote: I was skeptical. I didn't want some robot emailing potential clients on behalf of my firm. But ReplyRight keeps it professional and compliant — it even adds the right intake disclaimers automatically. New client response time went from 18 hours to under 30 minutes.
cards.name: Marcus Holloway
cards.title: Managing Partner, Holloway & Reeves Law

cards.quote: We're a small operation — just me and two techs. I used to answer emails from job sites, which was a nightmare. Now quote requests and scheduling emails just get handled. It even knows to ask if it's an emergency versus a routine call. Saves me probably an hour a day.
cards.name: Tyler Sorensen
cards.title: Owner, Sorensen Heating & Air

pricing_cta.headline_anchor: Your staff spends 2–3 hours a day on routine emails.
pricing_cta.headline_sub: At $20/hour, that's $1,200/month in time — just for email.
pricing_cta.offer_description: ReplyRight pays for itself in the first week. Start with a full-featured 14-day free trial — no credit card required. See the difference before you spend a dollar.
pricing_cta.trial_details: 14 days free. Full access. Cancel anytime.
pricing_cta.trust_line: No contracts. No setup fees. Cancel anytime. HIPAA-aware infrastructure.

footer.tagline: Every email. Every industry. Done right.
